mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sc (scid, cid, sid, grade, sarchive, sort) VALUES (#{scid}, #{cid}, #{sid}, #{grade}, #{sarchive}, #{sort})
mapper.update: UPDATE sc SET sarchive = #{archive} WHERE scid = #{scId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sc WHERE cid = #{cid} AND sid = #{sid}

SELECT course.cid, sc.scid, course.cname, course.invite, course.cdate, course.tid, teacher.tname, teacher.tphone FROM sc LEFT JOIN course ON sc.cid = course.cid LEFT JOIN teacher ON course.tid = teacher.tid WHERE sc.sid = #{sid} AND sc.sarchive = 0 AND course.archive = 0 ORDER BY sc.sort
SELECT sc.scid, sc.sid, course.cname, course.cid FROM sc LEFT JOIN course ON course.cid = sc.cid WHERE sc.sid = #{sid} AND sc.sarchive = 1 AND sc.cid IN (SELECT cid FROM course WHERE archive = 0)
SELECT MAX(sort) AS countCourse FROM sc WHERE sid = #{sid}
